title: Floquet Engineering of a Quasiequilibrium Superradiant Phase Transition in Landau Polaritons
abstract: Superradiant phase transitions (SRPTs), characterized by photon condensation and macroscopic matter polarization, are forbidden in equilibrium for homogeneous fields by no-go theorems. Here, we show that Floquet driving can circumvent this constraint in a Landau polariton system consisting of a two-dimensional electron gas coupled to a terahertz cavity in a DC magnetic field. An off-resonant AC magnetic field modulates the cyclotron frequency and light--matter coupling strength while leaving the diamagnetic term unchanged, generating an additional DC coupling contribution. This drives the system across a critical threshold into a superradiant phase, characterized by photon condensation and Landau-level polarization in the ground state of the Floquet Hamiltonian. This quasiequilibrium approach offers a route to SRPTs distinct from driven-dissipative schemes.
summary: 超辐射相变（SRPT）以光子凝聚和宏观物质极化为特征，根据 no-go 定理，在均匀场的平衡中是被禁止的。在这里，我们证明了 Floquet 驱动可以在由耦合到直流磁场中太赫兹腔的二维电子气组成的朗道极化子系统中规避这一限制。非共振交流磁场调制回旋加速器频率和光-物质耦合强度，同时保持抗磁项不变，产生额外的直流耦合贡献。这驱动系统跨过临界阈值进入超辐射阶段，其特征是弗洛奎哈密顿量基态下的光子凝聚和朗道能级偏振。这种准平衡方法提供了一条不同于驱动耗散方案的 SRPT 途径。

title: Bulk-dissociated topological bands without spin-orbit coupling in hetero-dimensional superconducting metamaterials
abstract: Topological superconductors (TSCs) in superconducting hybrid heterostructures, which integrate superconducting and non-superconducting materials, have been intensely investigated with the hope of discovering exotic non-Abelian anyons for fault-tolerant quantum computing. In this effort, a challenge for hybrid superconducting systems is controlling hybridization, which is often a balance between enhancing the superconducting proximity effect at the cost of suppressing desirable electronic properties such as strong spin-orbit interactions. Hence, discovering hybrid superconducting systems with topological properties controlled and enhanced by material geometry design without spin-orbit interactions would be intriguing to explore. In this work, we theoretically study a square superconducting network decorated with spin-polarized magnetic adatoms. We find that localized Yu-Shiba-Rusinov bound states at magnetic adatom sites collectively form a weak topological superconducting phase despite the absence of spin-orbit interactions. We then demonstrate that by tuning the Fermi energy of the network, the system can transition from a weak TSC phase to a bulk-dissociated TSC phase where the edge state bands separate from the bulk, giving rise to unexpected features such as nodal lines and co-existing bulk-dissociated edge and corner modes. Moreover, our findings highlight how hetero-dimensional superconducting metamaterials can serve as a useful template for controlling the coupling and dissociation between electronic degrees of freedom of different dimensionalities.
summary:
超导混合异质结构中的拓扑超导体（TSC）集成了超导和非超导材料，人们对其进行了深入研究，希望发现用于容错量子计算的奇异非阿贝尔任意子。在这项工作中，混合超导系统面临的挑战是控制杂化，这通常是增强超导邻近效应与抑制所需电子特性（例如强自旋轨道相互作用）之间的平衡。因此，发现具有通过材料几何设计控制和增强的拓扑特性而无需自旋轨道相互作用的混合超导系统将是令人感兴趣的探索。在这项工作中，我们从理论上研究了装饰有自旋极化磁性吸附原子的方形超导网络。我们发现，尽管不存在自旋轨道相互作用，但磁性吸附原子位点处的局部 Yu-Shiba-Rusinov 束缚态共同形成了弱拓扑超导相。

然后，我们证明，通过调整网络的费米能量，系统可以从弱 TSC 相转变为体解离 TSC 相，其中边缘态带与体相分离，从而产生意想不到的特征，例如节点线和共存的体解离边缘和角模式。此外，我们的研究结果强调了异维超导超材料如何作为控制不同维度电子自由度之间耦合和解离的有用模板。

title: Topological invariant of periodic many body wavefunction from charge pumping simulation
abstract: Many-body topological quantum states host exotic quantum phenomena and lie at the forefront of developing next-generation quantum technologies. Recently emerged neural network wavefunction methods have established themselves as a powerful computational framework for accessing these states, enabling the variational machine learning calculation of the system's ground state wavefunction. However, reliable computation of topological invariants remains an open challenge when the whole deterministic energy spectrum is not available. In this work, we introduce a robust approach to determining topological invariant based on simulating the charge pumping process, by monitoring the response of polarization upon flux insertion. By applying this method, we accurately extract the Chern numbers for Abelian fractional Chern insulators. Our approach also enables the first neural-network-wavefunction-based identification of anomalous composite Fermi liquid states. Our work resolves a key bottleneck in applying neural network wavefunctions to correlated topological matter, and the method proposed is also generally applicable to other many-body approaches, thereby opening up new avenues for future research in this field.
summary:
多体拓扑量子态具有奇异的量子现象，处于开发下一代量子技术的前沿。最近出现的神经网络波函数方法已成为访问这些状态的强大计算框架，从而能够对系统基态波函数进行变分机器学习计算。然而，当整个确定性能谱不可用时，拓扑不变量的可靠计算仍然是一个开放的挑战。在这项工作中，我们引入了一种稳健的方法，通过监测通量插入时的极化响应，基于模拟电荷泵浦过程来确定拓扑不变量。通过应用这种方法，我们准确地提取了阿贝尔分数陈绝缘体的陈数。我们的方法还首次实现了基于神经网络波函数的异常复合费米液态的识别。

我们的工作解决了将神经网络波函数应用于相关拓扑物质的关键瓶颈，并且所提出的方法也普遍适用于其他多体方法，从而为该领域的未来研究开辟了新的途径。

title: Immiscible to miscible quenching instabilities in two-dimensional binary Bose-Einstein condensates
abstract: Immiscible to miscible quenching transitions (IMQT) in homogeneous Bose-Einstein condensate are investigated, considering rubidium isotopes $^{85}$Rb and $^{87}$Rb confined in a two-dimensional (2D) circular box, under two different initial configurations. These IMQT instabilities, triggered by sudden reductions in the two-body interspecies scattering length $a_{12}$, are explored under two distinct initialconditions, highlighting the critical role of nonlinear dynamics in their evolution. The numerical simulations indicate that the instability dynamics are primarily driven by the production of large vortices and the propagation of sound waves (phonons), with sound wave excitations prevailing in the long-term evolution. The compressible and incompressible parts of the kinetic energy spectra, in terms of the wave number $k$, are confronted with the classical Kolmogorov scaling, $k^{-5/3}$ for turbulence, which is observed in the onset of instabilities. Before reaching the ultraviolet dissipation region at small scales, the IMQT spectra exhibit a bottleneck effect, indicating a clear departure from classical scaling behavior. In the time asymptotic miscible regime, it is observed that the vorticity and sound-wave production remain practically stable. In this regime, for both cases investigated, a linear relation is also recognized between the miscibility parameter and the initial IMQT configuration.
summary:
考虑到铷同位素 $^{85}$Rb 和 $^{87}$Rb 在两种不同的初始配置下被限制在二维 (2D) 圆形盒子中，研究了均质玻色-爱因斯坦凝聚中的不混溶到混溶猝灭转变 (IMQT)。这些 IMQT 不稳定性是由两体种间散射长度 $a_{12}$ 突然减小引发的，在两个不同的初始条件下进行了探索，强调了非线性动力学在其演化中的关键作用。数值模拟表明，不稳定动力学主要是由大涡旋的产生和声波（声子）的传播驱动的，在长期演化中声波激励占主导地位。动能谱的可压缩和不可压缩部分，以波数 $k$ 表示，面临着经典的柯尔莫哥洛夫标度 $k^{-5/3}$ 对于湍流，这在不稳定开始时观察到。在到达小尺度的紫外耗散区域之前，IMQT 光谱表现出瓶颈效应，表明与经典尺度行为的明显背离。

在时间渐近混相状态下，观察到涡度和声波产生实际上保持稳定。在这种情况下，对于所研究的两种情况，在混溶性参数和初始 IMQT 配置之间也存在线性关系。

title: Pressure-stabilized dual-BCC polymorphism in a rhenium-based high-entropy alloy
abstract: Accessing metastable structural states in high-entropy alloys offers a promising route to tailor material properties, yet the use of high pressure to engineer such states remains underexplored. Here, we report the pressure-driven synthesis of a unique metastable dual-BCC microstructure in a near-equimolar ReNbTiZrHf alloy. Starting from an ambient two-phase mixture of hexagonal (C14-derived) and body-centered cubic (BCC) phases, compression induces a selective, diffusionless transformation of the hexagonal constituent into a second, crystallographically distinct BCC polymorph, while the original BCC phase remains stable. Upon decompression, the pressure-induced BCC phase is kinetically trapped, yielding a dual-BCC state that is inaccessible via conventional thermal processing. The pressure-stabilized BCC polymorph is Re-enriched and inherits the exceptional stiffness of its hexagonal parent (bulk modulus ~290 GPa), creating a composite microstructure with pronounced elastic and mechanical contrast relative to the softer original BCC matrix (~180 GPa). These findings demonstrate that pressure can effectively navigate the flat free-energy landscapes of chemically complex alloys, establishing a robust pathway for polymorph engineering and metastable phase design in refractory HEAs.
summary:
获得高熵合金中的亚稳态结构状态为定制材料性能提供了一条有前途的途径，但利用高压来设计这种状态的方法仍未得到充分探索。在这里，我们报告了在近等摩尔 ReNbTiZrHf 合金中独特的亚稳态双 BCC 微观结构的压力驱动合成。从六方晶（C14 衍生）和体心立方 (BCC) 相的环境两相混合物开始，压缩诱导六方成分选择性、无扩散地转变为第二种晶体学上不同的 BCC 多晶型物，而原始 BCC 相保持稳定。减压时，压力诱导的 BCC 相被动力学捕获，产生传统热处理无法达到的双 BCC 状态。压力稳定的 BCC 多晶型物经过重新富集，继承了其六方母体的卓越刚度（体积模量约 290 GPa），形成了一种复合微结构，相对于较软的原始 BCC 基体（约 180 GPa），具有明显的弹性和机械对比。

这些发现表明，压力可以有效地引导化学复杂合金的平坦自由能景观，为难熔 HEA 中的多晶型工程和亚稳态相设计建立一条稳健的途径。

title: Including sample shape in micromagnetics with 3D periodic boundary conditions
abstract: Periodic boundary conditions (PBCs) for computing magnetic fields in repeating magnetic structures, e.g. in micromagnetic simulations, are typically imposed using the quasi periodic macrogeometry approach, where many copies of the simulated domain are introduced. This can be computationally problematic, especially if the simulated domain is incommensurate with the desired sample shape. In this work, we present a formal proof that for sufficiently large magnetic samples, only the average magnetisation gives non-negligible shape effects. Using this insight, we develop a simple, computationally efficient modification of existing implementations which incorporates shape effects in PBC methods.
summary: 用于计算重复磁结构（例如磁体）中的磁场的周期性边界条件 (PBC)在微磁模拟中，通常使用准周期性宏观几何方法来施加，其中引入了模拟域的许多副本。这可能会在计算上产生问题，特别是如果模拟域与所需的样本形状不相称。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个正式的证明，证明对于足够大的磁性样本，只有平均磁化强度才会产生不可忽略的形状效应。利用这一见解，我们对现有实现进行了一种简单、计算高效的修改，其中将形状效应纳入了 PBC 方法。

title: Path-Integral Formulation of Unavoidable Canonical Nonlinearity: Dynamic Discretization Cost over Variable Supports
abstract: In the statistical thermodynamics of classical discrete systems, the map from microscopic interactions to thermodynamic equilibrium configurations generally exhibits complex nonlinearity, known as "canonical nonlinearity" (CN). While conventionally characterized by the Kullback-Leibler (KL) divergence, this approach inevitably misses intrinsic nonlinearities arising from the discretization of continuous Gaussian families themselves. This intrinsic effect of unavoidable CN (UCN), has recently been quantified within a transport-information-geometric framework. However, the UCN is fundamentally limited to evaluating the discretization-induced cost for a single continuous distribution. It therefore does not capture the information-geometric cost between a continuous Gaussian reference and an actual discrete distribution, nor between states with fundamentally different supports, making it conceptually unclear how to decompose the overall CN. To address this limitation, we propose the Path-Integral UCN (PUCN) quantifying the cumulative information-geometric cost between distinct distributions. The PUCN adopts a path by (i) retaining the canonical distribution as an exponential family via the $e$-mixture (geometric mean) of the base measure, leading to an arithmetic mixture of the Fisher metric as the CN standard, and (ii) enforcing covariant changes in the discretization cell through the harmonic mixture of its second-moment matrix $M$, reflecting the uncertainty in parameter variations on the statistical manifold. The resulting PUCN provides a flexible measure of the geometric cost between arbitrary states, including those with essentially different supports. This formulation enables an explicit quantification of CN between different CDOS systems and a natural decomposition of the total CN into the UCN and a residual contribution, which has not been clearly separated in existing approaches.
summary:
在经典离散系统的统计热力学中，从微观相互作用到热力学平衡构型的映射通常表现出复杂的非线性，称为“正则非线性”（CN）。虽然传统上以 Kullback-Leibler (KL) 散度为特征，但这种方法不可避免地会忽略连续高斯族本身的离散化所产生的内在非线性。最近，这种不可避免的 CN (UCN) 的内在效应已在传输信息几何框架内得到了量化。然而，UCN 从根本上仅限于评估单个连续分布的离散化引起的成本。因此，它没有捕获连续高斯参考和实际离散分布之间的信息几何成本，也没有捕获具有根本不同支持的状态之间的信息几何成本，从而在概念上不清楚如何分解整个 CN。为了解决这个限制，我们提出了路径积分 UCN (PUCN) 来量化不同分布之间的累积信息几何成本。

PUCN 采用以下路径：(i) 通过基本测度的 $e$ 混合（几何平均值）将正则分布保留为指数族，从而将 Fisher 度量的算术混合作为 CN 标准；(ii) 通过其二阶矩矩阵 $M$ 的调和混合来强制离散化单元中的协变变化，反映统计流形上参数变化的不确定性。由此产生的 PUCN 提供了任意状态之间几何成本的灵活度量，包括那些具有本质上不同支持的状态。该公式能够对不同 CDOS 系统之间的 CN 进行显式量化，并将总 CN 自然分解为 UCN 和剩余贡献，这在现有方法中尚未明确分离。

title: Antitopological magnetic textures in an antiferromagnetically coupled bilayer with frustration
abstract: The bilayer skyrmion composed of upper and lower tightly coupled skyrmions on two layers with completely compensated topological charges (called as anti-topology here), has become one feasible improvement of conventional skyrmion to realize straight motion without skyrmion Hall effect, which has aroused great interest in practical applications. The present work investigates a general model (without external magnetic field) for the frustration-induced anti-topological bilayer magnetic textures with rich morphologies, and discusses the modulations of key parameters on the energy barrier and the current-driven dynamics. It is revealed that the interlayer coupling plays a key role in preventing distortion, and thus helps to reach a faster velocity. This model can be realized in various frustrated magnetic materials with antiferromagnetically coupled bilayer, providing a helpful guidance for the material design and application of topological magnetic textures.
summary: 由上、下两层紧密耦合的斯格明子组成的双层斯格明子，具有完全补偿的拓扑电荷（这里称为反拓扑），成为传统斯格明子的一种可行的改进，实现无斯格明子霍尔效应的直线运动，引起了实际应用的极大兴趣。目前的工作研究了具有丰富形态的挫败引起的反拓扑双层磁织构的通用模型（没有外部磁场），并讨论了能垒和电流驱动动力学上关键参数的调制。研究表明，层间耦合在防止畸变方面起着关键作用，从而有助于达到更快的速度。该模型可以在各种具有反铁磁耦合双层的受挫磁性材料中实现，为拓扑磁织构的材料设计和应用提供有益的指导。

title: Self-similar Dynamics in Percolation and Sandpile
abstract: Spatial self-similarity is a hallmark of critical phenomena. We study the dynamic process of percolation, in which bonds are incrementally added to an initially empty lattice until the system becomes fully occupied. By tracking the gap -- the size increment of clusters upon bond addition -- and the corresponding merged cluster, we identify scale-invariant temporal patterns in both quantities throughout a large portion of the process. This reveals a form of temporal self-similarity that has not been reported before. We further establish quantitative relations between the dynamic scaling exponents and the conventional static critical exponents, which enable the determination of critical behavior without prior knowledge of the critical point. The same self-similar dynamics is observed in both bond and site percolation on lattices and networks, and extends to other systems such as explosive and rigidity percolation. Moreover, similar temporal scaling is found in the initial nonequilibrium evolution of the Bak-Tang-Wiesenfeld sandpile model, suggesting a dynamic critical behavior distinct from its equilibrium state. These results provide a unified framework for understanding critical dynamics and may find applications in a broad range of complex systems.
summary:
空间自相似性是临界现象的标志。我们研究了渗透的动态过程，其中键逐渐添加到最初为空的晶格中，直到系统被完全占据。通过跟踪间隙（键添加时簇的大小增量）以及相应的合并簇，我们在整个过程的大部分过程中识别了两个数量的尺度不变时间模式。这揭示了一种以前从未报道过的时间自相似性形式。我们进一步建立了动态​​标度指数和传统静态临界指数之间的定量关系，这使得能够在不事先了解临界点的情况下确定关键行为。在晶格和网络上的键和位点渗透中观察到相同的自相似动力学，并且扩展到其他系统，例如爆炸性和刚性渗透。此外，在 Bak-Tang-Wiesenfeld 沙堆模型的初始非平衡演化中也发现了类似的时间尺度，这表明存在与其平衡状态不同的动态临界行为。

这些结果为理解关键动态提供了一个统一的框架，并可能在广泛的复杂系统中找到应用。

title: Activation of Inner-Shell 4p-Orbital Electrons of Rubidium Driven by Asymmetric Coordination at High Pressure
abstract: While the high oxidation states in heavy alkali fluorides (Cs, Ba, Ra) have been attributed to a pressure-driven upshift of energy level of inner p states, this route is largely ineffective for Rb because its smaller ionic radius suppresses the required level rise even under strong compression. Here, we predict a high-pressure layered ternary phase, RbBF5, in which 12-fold truncated-cube-like F coordination around Rb breaks local symmetry and activates the Rb 4p inner shell. The resulting orbital splitting selectively elevates the in-plane Rb 4px,y levels toward the F 2p manifold, enabling inner-shell participation and stabilizing Rb-F bonding under compression. More broadly, this symmetry-lowering coordination motif may provide a general mechanism for activating inner-shell p states in other alkali metals (e.g., K and Cs inner p states). These findings extend inner-shell chemistry to lighter main-group elements and establish a design principle for accessing unconventional bonding and oxidation states at high pressure.
summary: 虽然重碱金属氟化物（Cs、Ba、Ra）中的高氧化态归因于压力驱动的内部 p 态能级的上升，但该途径对于 Rb 来说基本上无效，因为即使在强压缩下，其较小的离子半径也会抑制所需的能级上升。在这里，我们预测了高压层状三元相 RbBF5，其中 Rb 周围的 12 倍截断立方体状 F 配位打破了局部对称性并激活了 Rb 4p 内壳。由此产生的轨道分裂选择性地将面内 Rb 4px,y 能级提升至 F 2p 流形，从而实现内壳参与并在压缩下稳定 Rb-F 键合。更广泛地说，这种降低对称性的配位基序可能提供激活其他碱金属内壳 p 态（例如 K 和 Cs 内 p 态）的通用机制。这些发现将内壳化学扩展到较轻的主族元素，并建立了在高压下获得非常规键合和氧化态的设计原理。

title: Superconductivity and competing orders in honeycomb $t$-$J$ model: interplay of lattice geometry and next-nearest-neighbor hopping
abstract: We investigate the extended $t$-$J$ model on honeycomb lattices with next-nearest-neighbor (NNN) electron hopping $t'$ and superexchange coupling $J'=(t'/t)^2 J$ using large-scale density-matrix renormalization group (DMRG) simulations and slave-boson mean-field theory (SBMFT). By systematically varying $t'$ and cylinder geometries, our DMRG results reveal several competing phases with distinct charge and superconducting (SC) properties. On YC4-0 cylinders possessing bonds lying along $\vec{e}_y$ direction, the ground state of doped models exhibits pronounced quasi-long-range $d$-wave SC with coexisting armchair-oriented stripes (a-stripe) across a broad range of $t'$. Notably, the SC Luttinger exponent has a non-monotonic dependence on $t'$, showing an optimal $t'_{op}\sim0.4$ for dominant SC. Conversely, XC cylinders host a competing long-range zigzag stripes phase without SC for $t'>0.5$, highlighting the role of boundary geometry in stabilizing distinct competing phases in DMRG. To elucidate the stability of all these competing phases in 2D limit, we employ SBMFT and identify the a-stripe as the stable configuration across most of phase diagram, with a transition to uniform nematic $d$-wave SC at large $t'$ for $\delta=1/8$. The combined results from two complementary approaches suggest a robust $t'$-induced SC phase that might remain stable in doped extended $t$-$J$ model on the honeycomb lattice.
summary:
我们使用大规模密度矩阵重正化群（DMRG）模拟和从玻色子平均场理论（SBMFT）研究了蜂窝晶格上的扩展$t$-$J$模型，具有次近邻（NNN）电子跳跃$t'$和超交换耦合$J'=（t'/t）^2 J$。通过系统地改变 $t'$ 和圆柱体的几何形状，我们的 DMRG 结果揭示了几个具有不同电荷和超导 (SC) 特性的竞争相。在具有沿 $\vec{e}_y$ 方向键的 YC4-0 圆柱体上，掺杂模型的基态表现出明显的准长程 $d$ 波 SC，并在广泛的 $t'$ 范围内共存扶手椅导向条纹（a-条纹）。值得注意的是，SC Luttinger 指数对 $t'$ 具有非单调依赖性，显示了主导 SC 的最佳 $t'_{op}\sim0.4$。相反，XC 圆柱体在没有 SC 的情况下具有竞争性长程锯齿条纹相，$t'>0.5$，突出了边界几何形状在稳定 DMRG 中不同竞争相中的作用。

为了阐明二维极限中所有这些竞争相的稳定性，我们采用 SBMFT 并将 a 条带识别为大部分相图中的稳定配置，并在大 $t'$ 处过渡到均匀向列 $d$ 波 SC，$\delta=1/8$。两种互补方法的综合结果表明，在蜂窝晶格的掺杂扩展 $t$-$J$ 模型中，$t'$ 诱导的 SC 相可能保持稳定。

title: Post-Jamming Mechanics of Feedback-Regulated Budding-Cell Packings
abstract: Budding-cell packings jam before all buds are mechanically constrained. The post-jamming state is therefore set by both the pressure $P$ and the fraction $u$ of buds that remain unconstrained. We develop a mean-field theory for this regime. A modified Maxwell count gives the post-jamming coordination, a depletion law for the unconstrained buds predicts the crossover density $\phi_2$ at which that reservoir is exhausted, and a flux-partition argument explains why strong growth feedback can markedly increase rigidity while generating little internal pressure.
summary: 在所有芽受到机械约束之前，出芽细胞堆积物就会堵塞。因此，干扰后状态由压力 $P$ 和保持不受约束的芽的分数 $u$ 决定。我们为这种状态开发了平均场理论。修改后的麦克斯韦计数给出了干扰后协调，无约束芽的耗尽定律预测了储层耗尽时的交叉密度 $\phi_2$，通量分配论证解释了为什么强生长反馈可以显着增加刚性，同时产生很少的内部压力。

title: Grain Growth Kinetics in (Cr,Mo,Ta,V,W)C1-δ High-Entropy Carbide Ceramics
abstract: Understanding grain-boundary mobility during spark plasma sintering can enable microstructure control in high-entropy carbides, yet quantitative grain-growth kinetics remain scarce. In this work, grain growth kinetics and densification behavior were investigated for single-phase fully dense (Cr,Mo,Ta,V,W)C1-{\delta} high-entropy carbide ceramics. Specimens were densified by spark plasma sintering for a constant dwell time of 10 min at temperatures between 1750 °C and 1950 °C to isolate the role of temperature on microstructural evolution. Increasing sintering temperature produced grain growth and increased lattice parameter, while maintaining a single-phase rock salt structure. Elemental mapping showed a progressive reduction of Ta segregation with increasing sintering temperature, suggesting enhanced chemical homogenization at elevated temperatures. Grain growth kinetics were analyzed using a normal grain growth model with an assumed growth exponent of n=3, physically reasonable for grain-boundary-controlled growth influenced by solute and vacancy pinning. Arrhenius analysis of the growth factor yielded an apparent activation energy of approximately 620 kJ mol-1, comparable to diffusion-controlled processes in refractory transition-metal carbides. Densification curves revealed rapid consolidation prior to reaching the peak temperature followed by temperature-dominated grain coarsening. These results establish quantitative relationships between densification temperature, grain growth, and diffusion kinetics in a carbide system, providing insight into the microstructural stability of high-entropy, ultra-high-temperature carbide ceramics.
summary:
了解放电等离子烧结过程中的晶界迁移率可以实现高熵碳化物的微观结构控制，但定量的晶粒生长动力学仍然缺乏。在这项工作中，研究了单相全致密 (Cr,Mo,Ta,V,W)C1-{\delta} 高熵碳化物陶瓷的晶粒生长动力学和致密化行为。通过在 1750 °C 至 1950 °C 的温度下持续 10 分钟的放电等离子烧结对样品进行致密化，以隔离温度对微观结构演变的作用。提高烧结温度会导致晶粒生长并增加晶格参数，同时保持单相岩盐结构。元素分布图显示，随着烧结温度的升高，Ta 偏析逐渐减少，表明高温下化学均质化增强。使用正常晶粒生长模型分析晶粒生长动力学，假设生长指数为 n=3，这对于受溶质和空位钉扎影响的晶界控制生长来说是物理合理的。

对生长因子的阿伦尼乌斯分析产生了大约 620 kJ mol-1 的表观活化能，与难熔过渡金属碳化物中的扩散控制过程相当。致密化曲线显示在达到峰值温度之前快速固结，随后是温度主导的晶粒粗化。这些结果建立了碳化物系统中致密化温度、晶粒生长和扩散动力学之间的定量关系，为了解高熵、超高温碳化物陶瓷的微观结构稳定性提供了见解。

title: Metadynamics for Vacancy Dynamics in Crystals
abstract: We propose a metadynamics-based (MetaD-based) approach for constructing the free energy surface (FES) of vacancy dynamics in crystals. In this approach, the vacancy FES can be constructed without explicitly defining a unique vacancy coordinate or introducing a set of parameters that strongly govern the FES topology, enabled by parallel bias MetaD with partitioned families (PB MetaDPF). In addition, the proposed approach is made more efficient and effective through a multi-hill strategy that exploits crystallographic symmetry. We demonstrate the validity of the proposed approach through applications to self-diffusion and impurity diffusion via monovacancies and divacancies in metallic and ionic crystals.
summary: 我们提出了一种基于元动力学（MetaD-based）的方法来构建晶体中空位动力学的自由能表面（FES）。在这种方法中，无需显式定义唯一的空位坐标或引入一组强烈控制 FES 拓扑的参数即可构建空位 FES，这由具有分区族的并行偏置 MetaD (PB MetaDPF) 启用。此外，通过利用晶体对称性的多山策略，所提出的方法变得更加高效和有效。我们通过金属和离子晶体中单空位和双空位的自扩散和杂质扩散的应用证明了所提出方法的有效性。

title: Force Field-Agnostic Phase Classification of Zeolitic Imidazolate Framework Polymorphs
abstract: Zeolitic Imidazolate Frameworks (ZIFs) are a family of metal--organic frameworks that feature metal centers tetrahedrally linked to imidazole-based ligands and adopt zeolite-like topologies. ZIFs formed by Zinc cations and imidazolate linkers exhibit a remarkable degree of polymorphism, which can be modulated by varying synthesis parameters or thermodynamic conditions (i.e., temperature and pressure). Computer simulations provide a unique way of studying these materials and their phase transitions from the microscopic standpoint, revealing their underlying molecular mechanisms. However, studying these mechanisms requires to be able to classify the phase of each molecular entity in an agnostic and automatic fashion, which is particularly challenging when the two phases involved are structurally very similar. In this work, we systematically study neural network classifiers to classify ZIF phases on-the-fly during molecular dynamics simulations. We test a variety of input features, differing both in the dimensionality and nature of the descriptors and in the kind of force field used for building the training/testing database. We reveal that even with low-dimensional descriptors the classification is highly accurate, while the use of high-dimensional descriptors leads to an even better performance. Training the classifier with configurations coming from different force fields we can remove force field bias and enhance the classifier performance and general applicability. Finally, we apply our classifiers to reveal mechanistic details of the ZIF-4-cp $\xrightarrow{}$ ZIF-4-cp-II phase transition.
summary:
沸石咪唑酯框架 (ZIF) 是一类金属有机框架，其特征是金属中心与咪唑基配体四面体连接，并采用类似沸石的拓扑结构。由锌阳离子和咪唑酯连接体形成的 ZIF 表现出显着程度的多态性，可以通过改变合成参数或热力学条件（即温度和压力）进行调节。计算机模拟提供了一种从微观角度研究这些材料及其相变的独特方法，揭示其潜在的分子机制。然而，研究这些机制需要能够以不可知和自动的方式对每个分子实体的相进行分类，当涉及的两个相在结构上非常相似时，这尤其具有挑战性。在这项工作中，我们系统地研究了神经网络分类器，以在分子动力学模拟过程中对 ZIF 相进行动态分类。我们测试各种输入特征，描述符的维度和性质以及用于构建训练/测试数据库的力场类型都不同。

我们发现，即使使用低维描述符，分类也是高度准确的，而使用高维描述符会带来更好的性能。使用来自不同力场的配置来训练分类器，我们可以消除力场偏差并提高分类器的性能和一般适用性。最后，我们应用分类器来揭示 ZIF-4-cp $\xrightarrow{}$ ZIF-4-cp-II 相变的机制细节。

title: Eigenstate entanglement entropy in Bose-Hubbard models
abstract: While the eigenstate entanglement entropy has been extensively studied for fermionic systems, much less is known about bosonic systems. Here, we study the entanglement entropy of mid-spectrum eigenstates of Bose-Hubbard models, focusing on weakly disordered models with and without particle-number conservation, and contrasting them with the translationally-invariant model. We analyze the volume-law and O(1) contributions to the entanglement entropy via the averages over mid-spectrum eigenstates and the corresponding distributions. We derive the volume-law coefficient of the entanglement entropy by generalizing the mean-field approach from [Phys. Rev. Lett. 119, 220603 (2017)] to many-body systems with a tunable local bosonic cutoff, which agrees with previous analytical and numerical results from [Phys. Rev. B 110, 235154 (2024)]. We show that the volume-law contribution to the entanglement entropy does not change upon breaking translational invariance via on-site disorder. We then numerically study the role of the subleading O(1) contribution to the entanglement entropy. We find that, in the particle-number conserving case, it exhibits a nontrivial dependence on the particle-number density and the local bosonic cutoff, while without particle-number conservation, results suggest the emergence of a universal O(1) contribution beyond the random pure state predictions.
summary:
虽然费米子系统的本征态纠缠熵已被广泛研究，但对玻色子系统的了解却少之又少。在这里，我们研究了 Bose-Hubbard 模型中谱本征态的纠缠熵，重点关注具有和不具有粒子数守恒的弱无序模型，并将其与平移不变模型进行对比。我们通过中谱本征态的平均值和相应的分布来分析体积定律和 O(1) 对纠缠熵的贡献。我们通过推广[Phys.莱特牧师。 119, 220603 (2017)] 到具有可调谐局部玻色截止的多体系统，这与 [Phys. 119, 220603 (2017)] 之前的分析和数值结果一致。修订版 B 110, 235154 (2024)]。我们证明，当通过现场无序打破平移不变性时，体积定律对纠缠熵的贡献不会改变。然后，我们数值研究了次主导 O(1) 对纠缠熵的贡献的作用。

我们发现，在粒子数守恒的情况下，它表现出对粒子数密度和局部玻色截止的非平凡依赖性，而在没有粒子数守恒的情况下，结果表明出现了超出随机纯状态预测的普遍 O(1) 贡献。

title: Linking Calendar and Cycle Ageing in Lithium-Ion Batteries through Consistent Parameterisation of an Electrochemical-Thermal-Degradation Model
abstract: Parameterisation of coupled degradation mechanisms in lithium-ion batteries is a major challenge. Interactions between the mechanisms depend on usage conditions: C-rate, rest state-of-charge (SoC), depth-of-discharge (DoD) and temperature. This work presents a framework to consistently parameterise key degradation modes--solid-electrolyte interphase (SEI) growth, lithium plating, and active material loss in both electrodes--using insights derived from degradation mode analysis data. The work predicts capacity fade trajectories of a NMC-based lithium-ion cell under both calendar and combined calendar-cyclic ageing, using a P2D electrochemical-thermal-degradation model. The work predicts state-of-health (SoH), remaining-useful-life (RUL) and internal degradation modes of the cell--under 81 combinations of temperature (10$^o$C, 25$^o$C, 40$^o$C), C-rate (0.1 C, 0.3 C and 1.0 C), rest SoC (10%, 60%, and 100%) and DoD (50%, 70%, and 90%)--using PyBaMM. The predicted cycle-life varies between 0.8 to 14 years to reach 75% of SoH. The work provides mechanistic insights into competing effects between calendar and cyclic ageing, during cycling. The model demonstrates sub-linear, linear, and sup-linear/accelerated capacity fade based on the usage conditions. The simulated dataset for all the cases is made available.
summary:
锂离子电池耦合退化机制的参数化是一个重大挑战。这些机制之间的相互作用取决于使用条件：C 速率、静止充电状态 (SoC)、放电深度 (DoD) 和温度。这项工作提出了一个框架，利用从降解模式分析数据中得出的见解，对关键降解模式（SEI）生长、锂电镀和两个电极中的活性材料损失进行一致参数化。这项工作使用 P2D 电化学热降解模型预测了基于 NMC 的锂离子电池在日历老化和组合日历循环老化下的容量衰减轨迹。这项工作预测了电池的健康状态 (SoH)、剩余使用寿命 (RUL) 和内部退化模式 - 在 81 种温度组合（10$^o$C、25$^o$C、40$^o$C）、C 速率（0.1 C、0.3 C 和 1.0 C）、剩余 SoC（10%、60% 和 100%）和 DoD 下（50%、70% 和 90%）——使用 PyBaMM。预计循环寿命为 0.8 至 14 年，可达到 SoH 的 75%。这项工作为骑行过程中日历和周期性老化之间的竞争效应提供了机械见解。

该模型根据使用条件演示了次线性、线性和超线性/加速容量衰减。所有案例的模拟数据集均可用。

title: Many-body dynamical localization in Fock space
abstract: We investigate the emergence of many-body dynamical localization (MBDL) in the Fock space of an interacting two-mode bosonic system subject to periodic driving. Using a mapping to the paradigmatic kicked-top model, we analyze the interplay between classical chaotic diffusion and quantum interference effects. While the mean-field (classical) dynamics exhibits bounded ergodic diffusion along the population imbalance axis, the quantum dynamics reveals strong suppression of transport in Fock space, in close analogy with Anderson localization in disordered lattices. We characterize the localization length, its scaling with particle number and driving parameters, and reveal the spectral crossover from random-matrix to Poisson statistics as the many-body ensemble localizes. We highlight the connection between MBDL and discrete time crystals. Our findings offer a promising avenue to study the Anderson transition in Fock space.
summary: 我们研究了周期性驱动下相互作用的双模玻色子系统的福克空间中多体动力学定位（MBDL）的出现。使用范式踢顶模型的映射，我们分析了经典混沌扩散和量子干涉效应之间的相互作用。虽然平均场（经典）动力学表现出沿着布居不平衡轴的有界遍历扩散，但量子动力学揭示了福克空间中输运的强烈抑制，与无序晶格中的安德森局域化非常相似。我们描述了定位长度、其随粒子数和驱动参数的缩放，并揭示了多体系综定位时从随机矩阵到泊松统计的光谱交叉。我们强调 MBDL 和离散时间晶体之间的联系。我们的研究结果为研究福克空间中的安德森转变提供了一条有前途的途径。

title: Balancing Thermodynamics, Kinetics, and Reversibility in Ti-Doped MgB2H8: A First-Principles Assessment of a Practical Solid-State Hydrogen Storage Material
abstract: Hydrogen storage remains a key challenge for the development of a sustainable hydrogen energy system, where materials must satisfy requirements on storage capacity, thermodynamics, kinetics, and reversibility. Complex borohydrides are attractive due to their high hydrogen density, but their practical use is limited by slow hydrogen diffusion and unfavorable desorption thermodynamics. In this work, we present a first-principles study of pristine and Ti-doped MgB2H8 as a solid-state hydrogen storage material. Density functional theory calculations show that pristine MgB2H8 has a high gravimetric hydrogen capacity of about 14.9 wt percent, but also a relatively high hydrogen desorption enthalpy of about 42 kJ per mol H2 and diffusion barriers around 0.5 eV, which limit its performance at moderate temperatures. Substitutional doping with Ti at the Mg site improves these properties while maintaining structural stability. The doped system retains a high hydrogen capacity of about 10.4 wt percent and shows a reduced desorption enthalpy of about 36 kJ per mol H2, placing it within a favorable thermodynamic range for hydrogen release. Nudged elastic band calculations show a reduction in hydrogen migration barriers to about 0.38 eV, indicating improved diffusion kinetics. Phonon and elastic analyses confirm that Ti doping preserves stability. Electronic structure analysis shows that Ti 3d states near the Fermi level weaken B-H bonding and stabilize intermediate hydrogen configurations, explaining the improved behavior. These results identify Ti-doped MgB2H8 as a promising hydrogen storage material.
summary:
氢存储仍然是可持续氢能源系统发展的关键挑战，材料必须满足存储容量、热力学、动力学和可逆性的要求。复杂的硼氢化物由于其高氢密度而具有吸引力，但其实际应用受到缓慢的氢扩散和不利的解吸热力学的限制。在这项工作中，我们提出了原始和掺钛 MgB2H8 作为固态储氢材料的第一性原理研究。密度泛函理论计算表明，原始MgB2H8具有约14.9wt％的高重量氢容量，但也具有相对较高的氢解吸焓（约42kJ/molH2）和扩散势垒约0.5eV，这限制了其在中等温度下的性能。在 Mg 位点用 Ti 进行替代掺杂可改善这些性能，同时保持结构稳定性。该掺杂系统保留了约 10.4 wt% 的高氢容量，并且显示出每摩尔 H2 约 36 kJ 的降低解吸焓，使其处于有利于氢释放的热力学范围内。

微移弹性带计算显示氢迁移势垒降低至约 0.38 eV，表明扩散动力学得到改善。声子和弹性分析证实钛掺杂保持了稳定性。电子结构分析表明，费米能级附近的 Ti 3d 态削弱了 B-H 键合并稳定了中间氢构型，从而解释了行为的改善。这些结果表明 Ti 掺杂 MgB2H8 是一种有前途的储氢材料。

title: Physical Properties of Dextran Solutions as Model Crowding Media
abstract: The role of macromolecular crowding in living systems is widely appreciated, but artificial crowders used to model these effects in vitro are often inadequately characterized. In this work, we examine density, viscosity, polymer self-diffusion and water diffusion in crowded dextran systems. Dextran viscosity and self-diffusion follow size-dependent trends, collectively described by universal functions of the overlap concentration corresponding to a Flory exponent of 0.44, characteristic of branched polymers. Viscosity increases with concentration as a power law, with a crossover from dilute to semi-dilute behaviors. Dextran self-diffusion decays exponentially: this can be interpreted in light of Rosenfeld's excess entropy scaling hypothesis. Water self-diffusivity and specific volume decrease with concentration, but show no dependence on polymer size. We show how these results can be used to construct the true volume fraction of crowders, which takes into account bound water. Overall, our findings showcase the power of polymer physics concepts in macromolecular crowding studies in vitro.
summary: 大分子拥挤在生命系统中的作用已被广泛认识，但用于体外模拟这些效应的人工拥挤器往往没有得到充分的表征。在这项工作中，我们研究了拥挤的葡聚糖系统中的密度、粘度、聚合物自扩散和水扩散。葡聚糖粘度和自扩散遵循尺寸依赖性趋势，通过重叠浓度的通用函数来共同描述，该函数对应于支化聚合物的特征——Flory指数0.44。按照幂律，粘度随着浓度的增加而增加，并具有从稀释行为到半稀释行为的交叉。右旋糖酐自扩散呈指数衰减：这可以根据罗森菲尔德的过量熵缩放假说来解释。水的自扩散率和比容随着浓度的增加而降低，但与聚合物尺寸无关。我们展示了如何使用这些结果来构建考虑了结合水的拥挤器的真实体积分数。总的来说，我们的研究结果展示了聚合物物理概念在体外大分子拥挤研究中的力量。

title: Steady-state phonon heat currents and differential thermal conductance across a junction of two harmonic phonon reservoirs
abstract: We study phonon transport in junctions of two harmonic reservoirs coupled together by a spring. The exact steady-state heat currents and thermal conductance are calculated using nonequilibrium Green's functions. We find that the heat currents follow Fourier's law and the thermal conductance has a peak whenever the phonon spectra match. At lower temperatures, however, the thermal conductance maximum may not coincide with the spectra-matching peak due to the exclusion of higher-frequency phonons, whose spectra may match, from participating in the transport. Furthermore, we find that increasing the coupling spring constant increases the thermal conductance. Lastly, the magnitude of the steady-state heat currents and thermal conductance are the same whether the direction of phonon flow is from left to right or vice versa, even with mass and spring constant asymmetry. The properties of this basic model can serve as a reference for more complicated setups of phonon transport in molecular junctions.
summary: 我们研究通过弹簧耦合在一起的两个谐波储存器的连接处的声子传输。使用非平衡格林函数计算精确的稳态热流和热导。我们发现热流遵循傅里叶定律，并且只要声子谱匹配，热导就会出现峰值。然而，在较低温度下，由于排除了频谱可能匹配的高频声子参与传输，因此热导最大值可能与频谱匹配峰值不一致。此外，我们发现增加耦合弹簧常数会增加热导。最后，无论声子流方向是从左到右还是从左到右，稳态热流和热导的大小都是相同的，即使质量和弹簧常数不对称。这个基本模型的性质可以作为分子连接中更复杂的声子传输设置的参考。

title: Complex paths for real stochastic processes
abstract: The calculation of the decay rate of a metastable state in the path-integral formulation of stochastic processes is revisited. Previous derivations of this rate were achieved at the cost of a step that is difficult to justify mathematically. We show that this difficulty can be resolved by working with an extremal solution that arises naturally in the Ito formulation of the path integral. To make the analysis as transparent as possible, we choose a simple potential for which the extremal solution can be written in terms of elementary functions. The mechanism identified here, however, is not restricted to this example and holds more generally.
summary: 重新审视随机过程路径积分公式中亚稳态衰减率的计算。之前对该速率的推导是以难以在数学上证明合理的步骤为代价的。我们证明，这个困难可以通过使用路径积分的伊藤公式中自然出现的极值解来解决。为了使分析尽可能透明，我们选择一个简单的势，其极值解可以用初等函数来编写。然而，此处确定的机制并不限于该示例并且更普遍。

title: Unifying hydrodynamic theory for motility-regulated active matter: from single particles to interacting polymers
abstract: Understanding how microscopic motility shapes emergent collective behaviors is a challenging task in active matter, especially when self-propulsion is regulated by external cues or via quorum-sensing interactions. To address this problem, we derive a closed hydrodynamics for scalar active matter with spatially-regulated motility, under general hypotheses for the microscopic dynamics of the particles' orientations. We show that, at large scales, the contribution of the latter is entirely captured by the autocorrelation tensor of the orientations. This allows us to establish a macroscopic equivalence within a broad class of motility-regulated active systems, from single particles to active polymers. Our formalism allows us to reveal a new form of motility-induced phase separation for quorum-sensing active polymers, which we term anti-MIPS, where dense phases exhibit enhanced activity relative to dilute regions. Our theory shows that anti-MIPS generically arises for motility-regulated agents with internal structure, uncovering the existence of several distinct transition pathways.
summary: 了解微观运动如何塑造新兴的集体行为是活跃物质中的一项具有挑战性的任务，特别是当自我推进受到外部线索或通过群体感应相互作用调节时。为了解决这个问题，我们在粒子方向的微观动力学的一般假设下，推导了具有空间调节运动性的标量活性物质的闭合流体动力学。我们表明，在大尺度上，后者的贡献完全由方向的自相关张量捕获。这使我们能够在从单个颗粒到活性聚合物的广泛的运动调节活性系统中建立宏观等效性。我们的形式主义使我们能够揭示一种新形式的群体感应活性聚合物的运动诱导相分离，我们将其称为抗 MIPS，其中致密相相对于稀释区域表现出增强的活性。我们的理论表明，抗 MIPS 通常出现在具有内部结构的运动调节剂中，揭示了几种不同转换途径的存在。

title: Multiscale perturbative approach to active matter with motility regulation
abstract: We present a coarse-graining method applicable to dry scalar active matter with motility regulation. Our approach, based on a multiscale perturbative expansion of the backward Kolmogorov equation, does not rely on any specific microscopic dynamics for the particles' orientations. Its generality allows us to address different forms of motility regulation, from space-dependent self-propulsion speed to taxis, and to extend the analysis to a class of non-Markovian orientational dynamics. Furthermore, we identify general conditions on the microscopic dynamics that ensure the existence of an effective large-scale equilibrium regime. When the latter are violated, our theoretical framework is able to quantitatively capture the emergence of large-scale particle currents. We directly apply our coarse-grained theory to several models of self-propelled agents, ranging from single particles to active polymers, and test our analytical predictions with numerical simulations. Finally, we show that our theory naturally extends to active matter with density-mediated interactions, such as quorum sensing, with potential applications to self-organizing soft materials.
summary: 我们提出了一种适用于具有运动调节的干标量活性物质的粗粒度方法。我们的方法基于向后柯尔莫哥洛夫方程的多尺度微扰展开，不依赖于任何特定的微观动力学来确定粒子的方向。它的通用性使我们能够解决不同形式的运动调节，从依赖空间的自推进速度到出租车，并将分析扩展到一类非马尔可夫定向动力学。此外，我们确定了微观动力学的一般条件，以确保有效的大规模平衡机制的存在。当后者被违反时，我们的理论框架能够定量捕获大规模粒子流的出现。我们直接将粗粒度理论应用于从单粒子到活性聚合物的几种自推进剂模型，并通过数值模拟测试我们的分析预测。最后，我们表明我们的理论自然延伸到具有密度介导相互作用的活性物质，例如群体感应，并具有在自组织软材料中的潜在应用。

title: Probing Electrostatic Disorder via g-Tensor Geometry
abstract: Low-frequency charge noise induced by fluctuating electrostatic disorder is a major limitation for semiconductor hole spin qubits. Here, we analyze the quasistatic response of a hole spin qubit to individual two-level fluctuators (TLFs). We show that, due to the anisotropy of the g-tensor, the qubit response depends on the geometry of the fluctuator-induced dipolar perturbation. We then propose a readout protocol that isolates selected g-tensor components through an accumulated Berry phase and estimate, within our readout model, an order-unity signal-to-noise ratio with a total protocol time in the tens of microseconds. Finally, using microscopic simulations, we compute the quantum Fisher information (QFI) to identify magnetic field directions and confinement regimes in which the qubit is most sensitive to disorder-induced variations of selected g-tensor components.
summary: 由波动的静电无序引起的低频电荷噪声是半导体空穴自旋量子位的主要限制。在这里，我们分析了空穴自旋量子位对单个两能级涨落器（TLF）的准静态响应。我们表明，由于 g 张量的各向异性，量子位响应取决于涨落器引起的偶极扰动的几何形状。然后，我们提出了一种读出协议，通过累积的 Berry 相位隔离选定的 g 张量分量，并在我们的读出模型中估计阶统一信噪比，总协议时间为数十微秒。最后，使用微观模拟，我们计算量子费希尔信息（QFI）来识别磁场方向和约束机制，其中量子位对所选 g 张量分量的无序引起的变化最敏感。

title: A three-dimensional morphoelastic model for self-oscillations in polyelectrolyte hydrogel filaments
abstract: We introduce a three-dimensional model for polyelectrolyte hydrogel filaments operating in a fluid environment under an electric field. The formulation builds on a morphoelastic framework for inextensible and unshearable rods, such that the filament's activity is encoded in electric-field-induced spontaneous curvatures, while hydrodynamic interactions are captured via a local approximation of Stokes flows. We employ this framework to investigate the prototypical case of a filament with elliptic cross-section clamped at its base. Under a constant and uniform electric field aligned with its axis, the filament undergoes flutter instability beyond a critical field strength, as revealed by a linear stability analysis. Depending on the model parameters, the instability is characterized by either two- or three-dimensional self-sustained oscillations. We further examine this behaviour through numerical simulations in the post-critical regime, showing that flutter may develop into large amplitude planar oscillations or more complex three-dimensional motions, through a secondary bifurcation. Although the study represents a first step towards extending state-of-the-art models for polyelectrolyte hydrogel filaments to three dimensions, the richness of the resulting dynamics achievable under time-independent forcing underscores the potential of the proposed actuation mechanism for the design of biomimetic cilia and soft robotic systems.
summary:
我们介绍了在电场下流体环境中运行的聚电解质水凝胶丝的三维模型。该公式建立在不可延伸和不可剪切棒的形态弹性框架之上，使得细丝的活动被编码在电场引起的自发曲率中，而流体动力学相互作用通过斯托克斯流的局部近似来捕获。我们利用这个框架来研究底部夹有椭圆形横截面的细丝的典型情况。正如线性稳定性分析所示，在与其轴对齐的恒定且均匀的电场下，灯丝会经历超出临界场强的颤动不稳定性。根据模型参数，不稳定性的特征是二维或三维自持振荡。我们通过后临界状态下的数值模拟进一步研究了这种行为，表明颤振可能通过二次分叉发展成大幅度平面振荡或更复杂的三维运动。

尽管这项研究代表着将聚电解质水凝胶丝的最先进模型扩展到三个维度的第一步，但在与时间无关的力下可实现的丰富的动力学强调了所提出的驱动机制在仿生纤毛和软机器人系统设计中的潜力。

title: Field-mediated active dynamical bonds
abstract: Active matter systems typically exhibit a trade-off between structural robustness and dynamical freedom, limiting independent control over structure and motion. Here, we show that encoding interactions in a shared field overcomes this constraint, enabling continuous tuning between stable architectures and dynamically active states. Using droplets on a vibrated fluid bath as a minimal realization, we demonstrate that individually unstable units can collectively self-stabilize through field-mediated dynamical bonds. Arising from wavefield interference, these bonds form persistent, self-healing connections that preserve architecture while sustaining motion. Droplet size sets the symmetry of the interactions, with identical droplets forming rigid $\sigma$-like frameworks that enforce triangular packing, while smaller droplets enable $\pi$-like coordination that supports higher-order symmetries. The resulting assemblies exhibit both stability and sustained collective dynamics, including spontaneous rotation and controlled migration. This work establishes a general route to programmable active matter in which shared fields reconcile structural robustness with dynamical freedom.
summary: 活性物质系统通常表现出结构鲁棒性和动态自由度之间的权衡，限制了对结构和运动的独立控制。在这里，我们展示了共享字段中的编码交互克服了这一限制，从而实现了稳定架构和动态活动状态之间的持续调整。使用振动流体浴上的液滴作为最小实现，我们证明了单独不稳定的单元可以通过场介导的动态键集体自稳定。由于波场干扰，这些键形成持久的、自我修复的连接，在维持运动的同时保护建筑。液滴大小决定了相互作用的对称性，相同的液滴形成刚性的 $\sigma$ 式框架，强制三角形堆积，而较小的液滴则实现 $\pi$ 式协调，支持高阶对称性。由此产生的组件表现出稳定性和持续的集体动力学，包括自发旋转和受控迁移。这项工作建立了一条通向可编程活性物质的通用途径，其中共享场协调结构鲁棒性与动态自由度。

title: $\mathrm{U}(2)$ Chern-Simons-Ginzburg-Landau Theory of Fractional Quantum Hall Hierarchies
abstract: We construct effective $\mathrm{U}(2)$ Chern-Simons-Ginzburg-Landau theories for Abelian and non-Abelian fractional quantum Hall hierarchies for those which had previously been described only through categorical data or trial wavefunctions. Our framework captures both Abelian hierarchy states built on half-filled Pfaffian-type parents and non-Abelian hierarchies emerging from Abelian states. It reproduces all filling fractions obtained from wavefunction and categorical constructions and, moreover, uniquely determines the corresponding topological orders. We also identify an intriguing particle-hole symmetry relating two hierarchy sequences, one built on a trivial insulator and the other on the $\nu=1$ integer quantum Hall state, which respectively generate the Read-Rezayi sequences and their particle-hole conjugates under the same hierarchy construction.
summary: 我们为阿贝尔和非阿贝尔分数量子霍尔层次结构构建了有效的 $\mathrm{U}(2)$ Chern-Simons-Ginzburg-Landau 理论，这些理论之前仅通过分类数据或试验波函数进行了描述。我们的框架捕获了建立在半填充普法夫型父级上的阿贝尔层次结构状态和从阿贝尔状态中出现的非阿贝尔层次结构。它再现了从波函数和分类结构获得的所有填充分数，此外，唯一地确定了相应的拓扑顺序。我们还发现了一种有趣的粒子空穴对称性，它与两个层次序列相关，一个建立在平凡的绝缘体上，另一个建立在 $\nu=1$ 整数量子霍尔态上，它们分别在相同的层次结构下生​​成 Read-Rezayi 序列及其粒子空穴共轭体。

title: Equivariant localization for higher derivative supergravity
abstract: Conformal supergravity provides an effective off-shell formalism to study higher derivative actions. We show that the $D=4$, $\mathcal{N}=2$ theory admits equivariantly closed forms. These may be used to compute closed-form expressions for supersymmetric observables in a general class of supergravity theories with higher derivative couplings, without any need to solve equations of motion. We discuss applications to holography, presenting results for on-shell actions that are conjecturally valid to all orders in the perturbative $1/N$ expansion.
summary: 共形超引力提供了一种有效的离壳形式来研究更高阶的导数作用。我们证明 $D=4$, $\mathcal{N}=2$ 理论承认等变封闭形式。这些可用于计算具有更高导数耦合的一般类超重力理论中超对称可观测量的闭合形式表达式，而不需要求解运动方程。我们讨论全息术的应用，提供壳上动作的结果，这些结果推测对扰动 $1/N$ 展开中的所有订单都有效。

title: Differential Equations for Massive Correlators
abstract: We uncover a combinatorial structure governing the differential equations satisfied by wavefunction coefficients of scalar fields with generic masses in de Sitter space. Using an integral representation of the massive mode functions, we express the Feynman integrals underlying cosmological correlators as twisted integrals of rational functions. In this formulation, the integrals belong to a finite set of master integrals obeying a first-order system of differential equations, which can be derived efficiently in the time-integral representation. We show that these equations admit a simple graphical description in terms of graph tubings, which encode the couplings among basis functions and the evolution of singularities. This structure provides an efficient algorithm to derive the differential equations, and a boundary-centric perspective on massive cosmological correlators in which their analytic structure emerges from underlying combinatorial data. As an illustration, we solve the system in the limits of small and large masses.
summary: 我们揭示了一种组合结构，该结构控制由德西特空间中具有通用质量的标量场的波函数系数所满足的微分方程。使用大规模模式函数的积分表示，我们将宇宙学相关器的费曼积分表示为有理函数的扭曲积分。在这个公式中，积分属于服从一阶微分方程组的有限主积分集，可以在时间积分表示中有效地导出。我们证明这些方程允许用图管进行简单的图形描述，它编码了基函数之间的耦合和奇点的演化。这种结构提供了一种有效的算法来推导微分方程，以及对大规模宇宙学相关器的以边界为中心的视角，其中它们的分析结构从底层组合数据中出现。作为说明，我们在小质量和大质量的限制下求解系统。

title: A Lapse in the Cosmological Constant Problem
abstract: We present a new mechanism for addressing the cosmological constant problem based on global constraints arising from a lapse function in a higher-dimensional gravitational theory. Inspired by Horava-Lifshitz gravity, we consider a 5d spacetime with anisotropic scaling along a compact extra dimension, while preserving Lorentz invariance in four dimensions. In the deep infrared limit, variation with respect to the lapse generates a global constraint on the 4d geometry, closely analogous to that of vacuum energy sequestering. Although the resulting effective gravitational equations differ from standard sequestering, radiative contributions to the Standard Model vacuum energy are nevertheless cancelled at all orders.
summary: 我们提出了一种新的机制来解决基于高维引力理论中的失效函数产生的全局约束的宇宙常数问题。受 Horava-Lifshitz 引力的启发，我们考虑沿着紧凑的额外维度具有各向异性缩放的 5d 时空，同时在四个维度上保持洛伦兹不变性。在深红外极限中，相对于时差的变化会对 4d 几何结构产生全局约束，这与真空能量隔离的约束非常相似。尽管由此产生的有效引力方程与标准隔离不同，但对标准模型真空能量的辐射贡献在所有阶次上都被抵消了。

title: On quantum tunnelling in the presence of Noether charges
abstract: We provide a complete first-principles based discussion of quantum tunnelling out of initial states carrying a conserved Noether charge. Our main result is a simple, unambiguous Euclidean-time prescription for the calculation of tunnelling rates out of such states. By relying on a combination of the direct approach and the steadyon framework for the evaluation of real-time path integrals, our derivation offers full transparency of its underlying assumptions, and is independent of any ad-hoc generalisations. This strategy also offers a simple explanation for the emergence of complex saddle points for such systems, justifying techniques postulated by earlier works. Our analysis furthermore offers the first results for initial states with both a conserved Noether charge and a non-trivial energy. We first illustrate the main conceptual points of our analysis for the simple example of a point particle in two spatial dimensions carrying a conserved angular momentum. Then, we generalise our results to the case of multiple dimensions and an arbitrary conserved Noether charge, providing an easy-to-implement prescription for the calculation of the tunnelling rate. We furthermore apply our results to the example of a complex scalar field subject to a global U(1)-symmetry with associated charge. These results provide a reliable foundation for the calculation of tunnelling rates in applications in finite-density and charge-asymmetric systems.
summary:
我们提供了基于第一原理的完整讨论，讨论了携带守恒诺特电荷的初始态的量子隧道效应。我们的主要结果是一个简单、明确的欧几里得时间处方，用于计算这些状态的隧道率。通过结合直接方法和稳态框架来评估实时路径积分，我们的推导提供了其基本假设的完全透明性，并且独立于任何临时概括。该策略还为此类系统复杂鞍点的出现提供了简单的解释，证明了早期作品假设的技术的合理性。我们的分析还提供了具有守恒诺特电荷和非平凡能量的初始状态的第一个结果。我们首先以两个空间维度中带有守恒角动量的点粒子的简单示例来说明我们分析的主要概念点。然后，我们将结果推广到多维和任意守恒诺特电荷的情况，为隧道率的计算提供了一个易于实现的处方。

我们进一步将我们的结果应用于具有相关电荷的全局 U(1) 对称性的复杂标量场的示例。这些结果为计算有限密度和电荷不对称系统中的隧道速率提供了可靠的基础。

title: Effective strings and particles interacting in 3D: the Ising model
abstract: We study how a fluctuating domain wall in three dimensions modifies bulk observables in a gapped phase. We introduce an effective interaction between the wall and the lightest bulk massive mode, and identify the regime in which this description is controlled: nearly on-shell bulk exchange with small momentum along the wall. In this regime, several observables are controlled by a renormalized dimensionless coupling $\lambda$, including the large-$L_z$ correction to the wall free energy and the large-$|x_\perp|$ tail of two-point functions in the presence of the wall. Other observables, such as one-point functions and two-point functions in the nearby-regime, retain non-universal dependence on operator data and on the bulk spectral density. We test the universal kinematic consequences of wall fluctuations, and find good agreement with the predicted rough-wall broadening and nearby Gaussian behavior in Monte Carlo simulations of the 3D Ising model with anti-periodic boundary conditions.
summary: 我们研究了三个维度的波动畴壁如何改变带隙相中的体可观测量。我们引入了壁和最轻的块体质量模式之间的有效相互作用，并确定了控制这种描述的状态：沿着壁的小动量的近壳体交换。在这种情况下，几个可观测量由重正化无量纲耦合$\lambda$控制，包括对壁自由能的大$L_z$校正和存在壁时两点函数的大$|x_\perp|$尾部。其他可观测量，例如附近区域中的一点函数和两点函数，保留了对算子数据和体谱密度的非普遍依赖性。我们测试了壁波动的通用运动学结果，并发现与具有反周期边界条件的 3D Ising 模型的蒙特卡罗模拟中预测的粗糙壁展宽和附近高斯行为非常一致。

title: Reduced superblocks at next-to-next-to-extremality for all half-maximally supersymmetric CFTs
abstract: We consider mixed four-point correlators of 1/2-BPS operators $\phi_{k}$ in SCFTs with eight real Poincaré supercharges, namely the 3d $\mathcal{N}=4$, 4d $\mathcal{N}=2$, 5d $\mathcal{N}=1$, and 6d $\mathcal{N}=(1,0)$ theories. Using the basis of solutions to the superconformal Ward identity introduced in arXiv:hep-th/0405180 , we demonstrate that the dynamical data in mixed correlators of extremality $\mathcal{E}=2$ is encoded in certain simpler ``reduced correlator" functions that admit a block expansion, in close analogy to the recent result for maximally supersymmetric CFTs in arXiv:2601.15407 . These reduced blocks similarly involve ordinary blocks with shifted kinematics and reproduce what is known in 4d, generalize a known example in 6d, and offer novel results in 3d and 5d.
summary: 我们考虑 SCFT 中 1/2-BPS 算子 $\phi_{k}$ 的混合四点相关器，具有八个实数庞加莱增压，即 3d $\mathcal{N}=4$、4d $\mathcal{N}=2$、5d $\mathcal{N}=1$ 和 6d $\mathcal{N}=(1,0)$ 理论。使用 arXiv:hep-th/0405180 中引入的超共形 Ward 恒等式的解决方案的基础，我们证明了极值 $\mathcal{E}=2$ 混合相关器中的动态数据被编码在某些更简单的“简化相关器”函数中，该函数允许块扩展，与最近的最大超对称 CFT 的结果非常相似arXiv:2601.15407 。这些简化的块同样涉及具有移位运动学的普通块，并再现 4d 中已知的内容，概括 6d 中的已知示例，并在 3d 和 5d 中提供新颖的结果。

title: Harmonic Analysis of the Instanton Prepotential
abstract: Discrete symmetries of Calabi-Yau moduli spaces, generated by isomorphic flops, constrain the instanton expansion of the 4D $\mathcal{N}=2$ Type~IIA prepotential. We show that the Coxeter-invariant functions into which the prepotential organizes are eigenfunctions of a Laplace-Beltrami operator built from the Coxeter-invariant symmetric bilinear form on the moduli space. This means that the Gromov-Witten expansion can be interpreted as a superposition of waves propagating on the Coxeter quotient of the moduli space, and its resummation is the corresponding spectral decomposition. For the dihedral Coxeter groups, separation of variables in the eigenvalue equation explains from first principles why special modified Bessel functions, ordinary Bessel functions and Jacobi theta functions appear as the natural building blocks of the prepotential, depending on whether the Coxeter rotation acts hyperbolically, elliptically, or parabolically. The resulting spectral representations converge efficiently in the interior of the moduli space, complementing the standard large-volume instanton expansion.
summary: 由同构触发器生成的 Calabi-Yau 模空间的离散对称性限制了 4D $\mathcal{N}=2$ Type~IIA 预势的瞬时展开。我们证明，预势组织成的 Coxeter 不变函数是根据模空间上的 Coxeter 不变对称双线性形式构建的 Laplace-Beltrami 算子的本征函数。这意味着格罗莫夫-维滕展开式可以解释为波在模空间的考克塞特商上传播的叠加，其恢复就是相应的谱分解。对于二面体 Coxeter 群，特征值方程中变量的分离从第一原理解释了为什么特殊的修正 Bessel 函数、普通 Bessel 函数和 Jacobi theta 函数出现为预势的自然构建块，具体取决于 Coxeter 旋转是双曲、椭圆还是抛物线。由此产生的谱表示在模空间内部有效收敛，补充了标准大体积瞬子展开。

title: Lattice Realizations of Flat Gauging and T-duality Defects at Any Radius
abstract: We analyze non-invertible topological interfaces and defects in the two-dimensional compact boson, focusing on the more exotic ones obtained by gauging continuous symmetries with flat connections on a half-space. These include interfaces between mutually irrational radii and T-duality symmetries at arbitrary boson radius. Using the modified Villain discretization on both a Euclidean two-dimensional square lattice and a quantum one-dimensional chain, we show that all these topological interfaces survive discretization and give rise to non-compact edge modes localized at the defect sites. Such non-compact edge modes imply a continuous defect spectrum and an infinite quantum dimension. In the special case of rational radii, we show how the defect action or Hamiltonian can be modified in order to compactify the edge modes and produce more standard defects with finite quantum dimension.
summary: 我们分析了二维紧致玻色子中的不可逆拓扑界面和缺陷，重点关注通过测量半空间上具有平坦连接的连续对称性而获得的更奇特的界面和缺陷。这些包括相互无理半径和任意玻色子半径处的 T 对偶对称性之间的界面。在欧几里得二维方晶格和量子一维链上使用修改后的 Villain 离散化，我们表明所有这些拓扑界面都可以在离散化中幸存下来，并在缺陷位点产生局域化的非紧边缘模式。这种非紧边缘模式意味着连续的缺陷谱和无限的量子维度。在有理半径的特殊情况下，我们展示了如何修改缺陷作用或哈密顿量，以压缩边缘模式并产生更多具有有限量子维度的标准缺陷。

title: Consistent Truncations from Duality Symmetries and Desingularization of Orbifold Uplifts
abstract: This paper is an extension of the results presented in \cite{Guarino:2024gke}. We study $ G_S$-invariant subsectors of maximal gauged supergravities and show that such models can provide consistent truncations even when $G_S$ is not a symmetry of the original supergravity. We show that this construction is key to building pure supergravities around a supersymmetric AdS$_D$ solution. We illustrate this construction by building a consistent $\mathcal{N}=4$ subsector of the $D=4$ $\mathcal{N}=8$ $[\mathrm{SO}(6)\times \mathrm{SO}(1,1)]\ltimes \mathbb{R}^{12}$ gauged supergravity. We use this result to build the uplift of the multicharge spindle solutions in type IIB and we define a simple criterion for assessing the regularity of the uplift. We show that the type IIB uplift of the spindle is always non-regular, admitting eight codimension-six orbifold singularities. We apply the same criterion to other spindle uplifts, recovering known results and making predictions on the regularity of spindles on (quasi-)regular SE$_7$ manifolds.
summary: 本文是 \cite{Guarino:2024gke} 中提出的结果的扩展。我们研究了最大规范超重力的 $G_S$ 不变子部分，并表明即使 $G_S$ 不是原始超重力的对称性，此类模型也可以提供一致的截断。我们表明，这种构造是围绕超对称 AdS$_D$ 解决方案构建纯超重力的关键。我们通过构建 $D=4$ $\mathcal{N}=8$ $[\mathrm{SO}(6)\times \mathrm{SO}(1,1)]\ltimes \mathbb{R}^{12}$ 计量超重力的一致 $\mathcal{N}=4$ 子扇区来说明这一构造。我们使用这个结果来构建 IIB 型多电荷主轴解决方案的隆起，并定义一个简单的标准来评估隆起的规律性。我们证明，纺锤体的 IIB 型隆起始终是不规则的，允许八个余维六环折叠奇点。我们将相同的标准应用于其他主轴隆起，恢复已知结果并对（准）正则 SE$_7$ 流形上的主轴规律性进行预测。

title: Covariant scalar-tensor theories beyond second derivatives
abstract: We propose a covariant, gauge-independent construction of foliation-based scalar-tensor theories, yielding diffeomorphism-invariant operators involving only gradients on the hypersurfaces where the scalar field is constant, assumed to be spacelike. This defines a basis of independent invariants up to four derivatives of $\phi$, including the first nontrivial parity-odd pseudoscalar at this order, with a straightforward extension to higher derivatives. Our framework goes beyond degenerate higher-order scalar-tensor (DHOST) theories and provides a nonlinear extension of U-DHOST (where $\nabla_\mu\phi$ is supposed to be timelike) directly in covariant form, without using unitary gauge as a starting point or imposing degeneracy a priori. After minimal coupling to gravity, we analyze the theory through its Hamiltonian constraint structure and linear cosmological perturbations about an FLRW background, and show that it propagates three physical degrees of freedom.
summary: 我们提出了基于叶状结构的标量张量理论的协变、规范无关的构造，产生微分同胚不变算子，仅涉及标量场恒定的超曲面上的梯度，假设是类空间的。这定义了最多四个 $\phi$ 导数的独立不变量的基础，包括该阶的第一个非平凡奇偶伪标量，并可以直接扩展到更高的导数。我们的框架超越了简并高阶标量张量 (DHOST) 理论，并直接以协变形式提供了 U-DHOST 的非线性扩展（其中 $\nabla_\mu\phi$ 应该是类时的），而不使用酉规范作为起点或先验地强加简并性。在与引力最小耦合后，我们通过哈密顿约束结构和关于 FLRW 背景的线性宇宙学扰动分析了该理论，并表明它传播了三个物理自由度。

title: Aspects of Non-Relativistic Supersymmetric Theories
abstract: Over the last decade, non-relativistic theories have attracted considerable attention. In general, such theories can be obtained by contracting relativistic parent theories. In this work, we discuss features of non-relativistic supersymmetric field theories from both the Galilean and Carrollian points of view that may be useful for constructing electric and magnetic non-relativistic theories.
summary: 在过去的十年中，非相对论理论引起了相当大的关注。一般来说，这样的理论可以通过收缩相对论母理论来获得。在这项工作中，我们从伽利略和卡罗尔的角度讨论非相对论超对称场论的特征，这些特征可能有助于构建电和磁非相对论理论。

title: Fermionic Casimir effect in an axial Lorentz-violating background
abstract: We investigate the fermionic Casimir effect for a Dirac field confined between two parallel plates with MIT bag boundary conditions in the presence of CPT-odd Lorentz-symmetry violation described by a constant axial background vector $b_{\mu}$. The exact mode quantization is derived from the modified Dirac equation in the planar geometry, and the vacuum energy is formulated through a phase-shift representation. For spacelike backgrounds we show that the components parallel to the plates can be absorbed into a shift of the transverse momenta and therefore do not affect the renormalized Casimir energy, while the component normal to the plates modifies the longitudinal spectrum and produces a genuine Lorentz-violating correction. Both the timelike component $b_{0}$ and the normal spacelike component $b_{z}$ can thus be treated within a unified framework characterized by a single effective spectral parameter. A closed logarithmic integral representation for the Casimir energy is obtained and its behavior is analyzed in the Lorentz-symmetric, weak-background, and strong-background regimes.
summary: 我们研究了在存在由恒定轴向背景向量 $b_{\mu}$ 描述的 CPT 奇洛伦兹对称性破坏的情况下，限制在具有 MIT 袋边界条件的两个平行板之间的狄拉克场的费米子卡西米尔效应。精确的模式量子化源自平面几何中修正的狄拉克方程，并且真空能量通过相移表示来公式化。对于类空间背景，我们表明平行于板的分量可以被吸收到横向动量的偏移中，因此不会影响重整化的卡西米尔能量，而垂直于板的分量会修改纵向谱并产生真正的洛伦兹破坏校正。因此，类时分量 $b_{0}$ 和法向类空分量 $b_{z}$ 都可以在以单个有效谱参数为特征的统一框架内进行处理。获得了卡西米尔能量的闭合对数积分表示，并分析了其在洛伦兹对称、弱背景和强背景状态下的行为。

title: The many facets of a hyperbolic tetrahedron: open and closed triangulations of 3d gravity
abstract: We study a model of 3d gravity relevant to the open sector of a CFT ensemble. The quantum theory is the open Virasoro TQFT, obtained by restricting the full open-closed Virasoro TQFT to a subclass of admissible manifolds. We show that it computes gravitational path integrals on compact regions with fixed-length boundary conditions for states above the black hole threshold, and fixed-angle boundary conditions for states below the threshold. Focusing on a special class of manifolds involving only boundary Wilson loops, we further show that the relation between Conformal Turaev-Viro theory and the diagonal sector of two copies of Virasoro TQFT arises naturally from an open-closed duality.
summary: 我们研究与 CFT 系综的开放扇区相关的 3D 重力模型。量子理论是开 Virasoro TQFT，通过将完全开闭 Virasoro TQFT 限制为容许流形的子类而获得。我们证明，它计算紧凑区域上的引力路径积分，对于高于黑洞阈值的状态具有固定长度边界条件，对于低于阈值的状态具有固定角度边界条件。着眼于仅涉及边界 Wilson 环的一类特殊流形，我们进一步证明了共形 Turaev-Viro 理论与 Virasoro TQFT 两个副本的对角扇区之间的关系自然地源于开闭对偶性。

title: Space- vs Time-dependence in taming the infrared instability of projectable Ho\v rava Gravity
abstract: Minkowski spacetime exhibits infrared instability in projectable Ho\v rava gravity in (3+1) dimensions. To be phenomenologically viable, the instability should be either hidden by other time-dependent processes such as the Hubble expansion of the universe and the Jeans instability, or evolve into another static solution with low average curvature. While the former scenario leads to a phenomenological constraint on the infrared properties of the renormalization group flow, this paper explores the latter possibility. We study if the presence of higher derivative terms in the action can lead to existence of static, inhomogeneous (quasi-) periodic solutions with planar symmetry, similar to modulated phases in magnetic materials. We find that such solutions do not exist. In doing so, we classify all static homogeneous and isotropic solutions and solutions with planar symmetry. We provide arguments that none of them can serve as an endpoint for the evolution of the Minkowski instability. This motivates further study of the scenario where the instability is concealed by time evolution.
summary: 闵可夫斯基时空在 (3+1) 维度的可投影 Ho\v rava 引力中表现出红外不稳定性。为了在现象学上可行，不稳定性应该被其他与时间相关的过程（例如宇宙的哈勃膨胀和金斯不稳定性）隐藏，或者演变成另一种具有低平均曲率的静态解。虽然前一种情况导致了对重正化群流的红外特性的唯象约束，但本文探讨了后一种可能性。我们研究作用中高阶导数项的存在是否会导致具有平面对称性的静态、非齐次（准）周期解的存在，类似于磁性材料中的调制相位。我们发现这样的解决方案并不存在。在此过程中，我们对所有静态齐次和各向同性解以及具有平面对称性的解进行分类。我们提出的论点是，它们都不能作为闵可夫斯基不稳定性演化的终点。这激发了对时间演化掩盖不稳定性的情况的进一步研究。

title: D2-brane probes of non-toric cDV threefolds via monopole superpotentials
abstract: We develop a framework to construct worldvolume gauge theories on D2-branes probing compound Du Val (cDV) Calabi-Yau threefold singularities. By viewing these singularities as ADE surface fibrations over the complex $w$-plane, we encode their geometry in a Higgs field $\Phi(w)$. A D2-brane probe perceives $\Phi(w)$ as an $\mathcal{N}=2$ deformation of its 3d $\mathcal{N}=4$ affine Dynkin quiver gauge theory via polynomial and monopole superpotential terms. By exploiting 3d mirror symmetry, we obtain an effective theory that correctly reproduces the quiver-collapsing mechanism known in the mathematical literature. We present several examples, including non-toric and non-resolvable cases.
summary: 我们开发了一个框架来构建关于 D2 膜探测复合 Du Val (cDV) Calabi-Yau 三重奇点的世界体积规范理论。通过将这些奇点视为复杂 $w$ 平面上的 ADE 表面纤维，我们将它们的几何形状编码在希格斯场 $\Phi(w)$ 中。 D2 膜探针将 $\Phi(w)$ 视为其 3d $\mathcal{N}=4$ 仿射 Dynkin 颤动规范理论通过多项式和单极超势项的 $\mathcal{N}=2$ 变形。通过利用 3D 镜像对称性，我们获得了一种有效的理论，可以正确地再现数学文献中已知的箭袋塌陷机制。我们提供了几个例子，包括非复曲面和不可解析的情况。

title: Relativistic single-electron wavepacket in quantum electromagnetic fields II: Quantum radiation emitted by a uniformly accelerated electron
abstract: We compute the quantum radiation emitted by wavepackets of relativistic single electrons, both at rest and undergoing uniform acceleration in the Minkowski vacuum of the electromagnetic field. We find that the cubic terms in the original nonlinear action of electrodynamics should be considered in obtaining the quantum radiation to the leading order. We show that the quantum radiation from a single-electron wavepacket at rest vanishes exactly. For a uniformly accelerated electron, the quantum radiated power has secular growth in the long-time regime. We demonstrate that this secular growth has a classical interpretation, and argue that the resummed quantum radiation at late times would not diverge. Regarding experimental proposals for the detection of the Unruh effect from the quantum radiation in the `blind spots' of classical radiation we ascertain that quantum corrections in the two blind spots are fully contributed by the transverse deviation correlators, where the dominant contributions are irrelevant to the Unruh effect in electron microscopes.
summary: 我们计算相对论性单电子波包发射的量子辐射，无论是静止状态还是在明可夫斯基电磁场真空中经历均匀加速。我们发现，在获得前导阶量子辐射时，应考虑电动力学原始非线性作用中的三次项。我们证明，来自静止状态的单电子波包的量子辐射完全消失。对于均匀加速的电子，量子辐射功率在长时间状态下具有长期增长。我们证明这种长期增长具有经典解释，并认为后期恢复的量子辐射不会发散。关于检测经典辐射“盲点”中量子辐射的安鲁效应的实验建议，我们确定两个盲点中的量子校正完全由横向偏差相关器贡献，其中主要贡献与电子显微镜中的安鲁效应无关。

title: The superconformal index and localizing higher derivative supergravity
abstract: We show how equivariant localization can be used to compute the on-shell action for supersymmetric $D=5$ $AdS$ rotating, charged black holes in theories of supergravity with higher derivatives. An exact match with a dual field theory computation of the superconformal index in a Cardy-like limit is achieved.
summary: 我们展示了如何使用等变局域化来计算具有更高导数的超引力理论中超对称 $D=5$ $AdS$ 旋转带电黑洞的壳上作用。实现了类卡迪极限中超共形指数与双场论计算的精确匹配。

title: Conservation laws in Lie-Poisson classical field theories
abstract: Lie-Poisson classical field theory is a field-theoretical model embedded in a non-commutative structure related to the framework of Poisson electrodynamics. In this paper, we follow the recently developed action principle for Lie-Poisson electrodynamics to derive the conservation laws of the theory. The energy-momentum tensor is obtained, along with the conserved electric charge and the momentum operator. We consider non-interacting examples for real and complex scalar fields, as well as the Dirac field, within the $\kappa$-Minkowski spacetime framework. In the latter case, we show that the non-relativistic limit for the $\kappa$-Minkowski Dirac equation introduces an orbital Zeeman coupling term for the fermionic fields, and the energy shift in the first excited state depends exclusively on the $\kappa$-parameter.
summary: 李-泊松经典场论是一种嵌入与泊松电动力学框架相关的非交换结构中的场论模型。在本文中，我们遵循最近发展的李泊松电动力学作用原理来推导该理论的守恒定律。获得能量动量张量以及守恒电荷和动量算子。我们在 $\kappa$-Minkowski 时空框架内考虑实数和复数标量场以及狄拉克场的非相互作用示例。在后一种情况下，我们表明 $\kappa$-Minkowski Dirac 方程的非相对论极限引入了费米子场的轨道塞曼耦合项，并且第一激发态的能量偏移完全取决于 $\kappa$ 参数。

title: Classification of 2D Fermionic Systems with a $\mathbb Z_2$ Flavor Symmetry
abstract:
We classify superfusion categories describing two-dimensional fermionic systems equipped with the universal fermion-parity symmetry, implemented by a topological defect line (TDL) $Z$, and an additional $\mathbb{Z}_2$ flavor symmetry generated by a $W$ TDL. Depending on whether $W$ is m-type or q-type, its fusion rules lead to three distinct classes, and solving the super-pentagon equations yields 16 consistent superfusion categories. These are labeled by invariants $(
u_W,
u_Z,
u_{WZ})$, which determine the $\mathbb{Z}_8$ anomaly classes of the symmetries generated by $W$, $Z$, and $WZ$. We also provide explicit realizations using multiple Majorana fermions and comment on implications for fermionic CFTs and gapped phases.
summary:
我们对描述二维费米子系统的超融合类别进行分类，该系统配备了通用费米子宇称对称性，由拓扑缺陷线（TDL）$Z$实现，以及由$W$TDL生成的附加$\mathbb{Z}_2$风味对称性。根据 $W$ 是 m 型还是 q 型，其融合规则会产生三个不同的类别，并且求解超五边形方程会产生 16 个一致的超融合类别。这些由不变量 $(
u_W,
u_Z,
u_{WZ})$ 标记，它确定由 $W$、$Z$ 和 $WZ$ 生成的对称性的 $\mathbb{Z}_8$ 异常类。我们还提供了使用多个马约拉纳费米子的显式实现，并对费米子 CFT 和带隙相的影响进行了评论。

title: Periodicity in Ergodic Quantum Processes
abstract: We study the periodic properties of sequences of quantum channels sampled from an ergodic stochastic process satisfying a natural irreducibility condition. We relate these periodic properties to certain global spectral data defined by the sequence of quantum channels, proving a general Perron-Frobenius-type theorem. We give examples to motivate the theory and conclude with some open problems and conjectures.
summary: 我们研究从满足自然不可约性条件的遍历随机过程中采样的量子通道序列的周期性特性。我们将这些周期性特性与量子通道序列定义的某些全局光谱数据联系起来，证明了一般的佩伦-弗罗贝尼乌斯型定理。我们给出例子来激发理论，并以一些悬而未决的问题和猜想作为结论。

title: Heat and thermal travelling wave solutions of a nonlinear Maxwell-Cattaneo-Vernotte equation
abstract: The propagation of heat and thermal signals in the form of travelling waves is investigated for a nonlinear Maxwell-Cattaneo-Vernotte equation. The exact wave solutions are derived by expressing the thermal conductivity and the relaxation time as polynomial functions of the temperature. This approach enables the identification of suitable degrees of nonlinearity that give rise to soliton solutions. Finally, exact solutions are shown through plots for the values of the selected parameters.
summary: 针对非线性 Maxwell-Cattaneo-Vernotte 方程研究了行波形式的热量和热信号的传播。通过将热导率和弛豫时间表示为温度的多项式函数来导出精确的波解。这种方法能够识别产生孤子解的合适的非线性度。最后，通过所选参数值的绘图显示精确解。

title: Geometry-Induced Long-Range Correlations in Recurrent Neural Network Quantum States
abstract: Neural Quantum States based on autoregressive recurrent neural network (RNN) wave functions enable efficient sampling without Markov-chain autocorrelation, but standard RNN architectures are biased toward finite-length correlations and can fail on states with long-range dependencies. A common response is to adopt transformer-style self-attention, but this typically comes with substantially higher computational and memory overhead. Here we introduce dilated RNN wave functions, where recurrent units access distant sites through dilated connections, injecting an explicit long-range inductive bias while retaining a favorable $\mathcal{O}(N \log N)$ forward pass scaling. We show analytically that dilation changes the correlation geometry and can induce power-law correlation scaling in a simplified linearized and perturbative setting. Numerically, for the critical 1D transverse-field Ising model, dilated RNNs reproduce the expected power-law connected two-point correlations in contrast to the exponential decay typical of conventional RNN ansätze. We further show that the dilated RNN accurately approximates the one-dimensional Cluster state, a paradigmatic example with long-range conditional correlations that has previously been reported to be challenging for RNN-based wave functions. These results highlight dilation as a simple geometric mechanism for building correlation-aware autoregressive neural quantum states.
summary:
基于自回归递归神经网络 (RNN) 波函数的神经量子态可以在没有马尔可夫链自相关的情况下实现高效采样，但标准 RNN 架构偏向于有限长度相关性，并且可能在具有长程依赖性的状态上失败。常见的应对措施是采用 Transformer 式的自注意力机制，但这通常会带来更高的计算和内存开销。在这里，我们引入扩张的 RNN 波函数，其中循环单元通过扩张的连接访问远处的站点，注入显式的远程归纳偏差，同时保留有利的 $\mathcal{O}(N \log N)$ 前向传递缩放。我们通过分析表明，膨胀改变了相关几何形状，并且可以在简化的线性化和扰动设置中引起幂律相关缩放。在数值上，对于关键的一维横向场 Ising 模型，扩张的 RNN 再现了预期的幂律连接的两点相关性，这与传统 RNN ansätze 典型的指数衰减形成鲜明对比。

我们进一步表明，扩张的 RNN 准确地逼近了一维簇状态，这是一个具有远程条件相关性的典型示例，此前曾报道称，这对于基于 RNN 的波函数来说是一个挑战。这些结果强调了膨胀作为一种简单的几何机制，用于构建相关感知的自回归神经量子态。

title: Hardware-Efficient Erasure Qubits With Superconducting Transmon Qutrits
abstract: Quantum error correction using erasure qubits offers higher fault-tolerant thresholds and improved scaling by converting dominant physical errors into detectable erasures. In superconducting circuits, erasure qubits can be constructed using the dual-rail approach, which, however, requires additional qubit-count overhead and tailored coupling elements. Here, we demonstrate a hardware-efficient scheme that operates transmon qutrits as erasure qubits, which is compatible with standard superconducting circuit-QED hardware. The logical states $\ket{0_\text{L}}$ and $\ket{1_\text{L}}$ are represented by the ground and second excited states, while the dominant relaxation errors can be detected via an ancilla qubit using a microwave-activated two-qutrit SWAP gate. We demonstrate a logical qubit $T_1$ lifetime exceeding $500\,\mu\mathrm{s}$, post-selected with repeated mid-circuit erasure detection, which is ten times longer than the $T_1$ time of the transmon physical qubit. Coherence times beyond $300\,\mu\mathrm{s}$ are achieved using dynamical decoupling. Single-qubit gate operations reach average Clifford gate infidelity on the order of $10^{-4}$. We further demonstrate dual-purposing an ancilla qubit for both erasure detection and parity checking, showing heralded generation of Bell states between erasure qubits. These results suggest that mainstream architectures of transmon qubit arrays may already be capable of implementing erasure-based QEC strategies for hardware-efficient fault-tolerant quantum computing.
summary:
使用擦除量子位的量子纠错通过将主要物理错误转换为可检测的擦除来提供更高的容错阈值和改进的扩展。在超导电路中，可以使用双轨方法构建擦除量子位，但这需要额外的量子位计数开销和定制的耦合元件。在这里，我们演示了一种硬件高效的方案，该方案将 transmon qutrit 作为擦除量子位进行操作，该方案与标准超导电路 QED 硬件兼容。逻辑态 $\ket{0_\text{L}}$ 和 $\ket{1_\text{L}}$ 由基态和第二激发态表示，而主要弛豫误差可以通过使用微波激活的双量子体交换门的辅助量子位来检测。我们演示了逻辑量子位 $T_1$ 寿命超过 $500\,\mu\mathrm{s}$，通过重复的中电路擦除检测进行后选择，这比 transmon 物理量子位的 $T_1$ 时间长十倍。使用动态解耦可实现超过 $300\,\mu\mathrm{s}$ 的相干时间。单量子位门操作的平均 Clifford 门不忠度约为 10^{-4}$。

我们进一步演示了用于擦除检测和奇偶校验的双重用途的辅助量子位，显示了擦除量子位之间贝尔态的生成。这些结果表明，transmon 量子位阵列的主流架构可能已经能够实现基于擦除的 QEC 策略，以实现硬件高效的容错量子计算。

title: The MQT Compiler Collection: A Blueprint for a Future-Proof Quantum-Classical Compilation Framework
abstract: As the capabilities of quantum computing hardware continue to rise, algorithms that exploit them are becoming increasingly complex. These developments increase the need for sophisticated compilation frameworks that translate high-level algorithms into executable code. In the past, most solutions were built with a quantum-first approach and handled mostly pure quantum programs without classical elements such as structured control flow. However, developments in quantum algorithms, error correction, and optimization, as well as the integration into high-performance computing (HPC) environments, depend on such classical elements. As quantum-first approaches increasingly struggle to handle these concepts, classical-first approaches are becoming a promising alternative. In this work, we present the MQT Compiler Collection, a blueprint for a future-proof quantum-classical compilation framework built on the Multi-Level Intermediate Representation (MLIR). After years of experience with the quantum-first approach and its shortcomings, we propose a framework that embraces core MLIR concepts to support the full compilation pipeline from high-level algorithms to hardware-specific instructions. The proposed architecture is designed from the ground up to support complex optimizations beyond, e.g., simple gate cancellation. It is publicly available at this https URL .
summary:
随着量子计算硬件的能力不断提高，利用它们的算法变得越来越复杂。这些发展增加了对将高级算法转换为可执行代码的复杂编译框架的需求。过去，大多数解决方案都是采用量子优先方法构建的，并且处理的大多是纯量子程序，没有结构化控制流等经典元素。然而，量子算法、纠错和优化的发展以及与高性能计算 (HPC) 环境的集成都依赖于这些经典元素。随着量子优先方法越来越难以处理这些概念，经典优先方法正在成为一种有前途的替代方案。在这项工作中，我们提出了 MQT 编译器集合，这是一个基于多级中间表示 (MLIR) 构建的面向未来的量子经典编译框架的蓝图。经过多年对量子优先方法及其缺点的经验，我们提出了一个包含核心 MLIR 概念的框架，以支持从高级算法到硬件特定指令的完整编译管道。

所提出的架构是从头开始设计的，以支持复杂的优化，例如简单的门取消。可通过此 https URL 公开获取。

title: Arqon: A suite of control applications enabling a reliable quantum network
abstract: A quantum network's purpose is to enable users to execute applications on end nodes. This requires the network to provide the service of creating entangled links between those nodes. Users of mature networks, such as the internet or the telephone network expect accepted service demands to be met reliably. We first define reliability requirements that extend classical computer network concepts to quantum network service delivery. We then introduce Arqon, a suite of control applications designed to deliver reliable service in centrally controlled quantum networks. We demonstrate through both analytic and numerical evaluation that Arqon satisfies all reliability requirements for accepted demands. These evaluations consider static network topologies. We provide a complete Python implementation and perform complexity analysis showing that admission control scales as $O(k^3)$ in the number of incoming demands $k$ and schedule computation scales as ${O(N^3)}$ in the number of accepted demands to schedule $N$.
summary: 量子网络的目的是使用户能够在终端节点上执行应用程序。这需要网络提供在这些节点之间创建纠缠链接的服务。成熟网络（例如互联网或电话网络）的用户期望可靠地满足公认的服务需求。我们首先定义可靠性要求，将经典计算机网络概念扩展到量子网络服务交付。然后我们介绍 Arqon，这是一套控制应用程序，旨在在集中控制的量子网络中提供可靠的服务。我们通过分析和数值评估证明 Arqon 满足可接受要求的所有可靠性要求。这些评估考虑静态网络拓扑。我们提供了完整的 Python 实现并执行复杂性分析，显示准入控制在传入需求数量 $k$ 中的规模为 $O(k^3)$，在调度 $N$ 的接受需求数量中调度计算规模为 ${O(N^3)}$。

title: Weak Adversarial Neural Pushforward Method for the Wigner Transport Equation
abstract: We extend the Weak Adversarial Neural Pushforward Method to the Wigner transport equation governing the phase-space dynamics of quantum systems. The central contribution is a structural observation: integrating the nonlocal pseudo-differential potential operator against plane-wave test functions produces a Dirac delta that exactly inverts the Fourier transform defining the Wigner potential kernel, reducing the operator to a pointwise finite difference of the potential at two shifted arguments. This holds in arbitrary dimension, requires no truncation of the Moyal series, and treats the potential as a black-box function oracle with no derivative information. To handle the negativity of the Wigner quasi-probability distribution, we introduce a signed pushforward architecture that decomposes the solution into two non-negative phase-space distributions mixed with a learnable weight. The resulting method inherits the mesh-free, Jacobian-free, and scalable properties of the original framework while extending it to the quantum setting.
summary: 我们将弱对抗神经前推方法扩展到控制量子系统相空间动力学的维格纳输运方程。核心贡献是结构观察：将非局部伪微分势算子与平面波测试函数相结合，产生狄拉克δ，它精确地反转定义维格纳势核的傅里叶变换，将算子简化为两个移位参数处势的逐点有限差。这在任意维度上都成立，不需要截断 Moyal 级数，并将势视为没有衍生信息的黑盒函数预言机。为了处理维格纳准概率分布的负性，我们引入了一种带符号的前推架构，它将解决方案分解为两个与可学习权重混合的非负相空间分布。由此产生的方法继承了原始框架的无网格、无雅可比行列式和可扩展的特性，同时将其扩展到量子设置。

title: Comparison of the standard and dressed-picture master equations for the quantum Rabi model in the ultrastrong coupling regime
abstract: The goal of this chapter is to investigate the effects of relaxation and dephasing on the quantum Rabi model in the ultrastrong coupling regime, and to provide explicit formulas to implement and numerically solve the resulting nonunitary dynamics from first principles.
